topic: Why narcissists are so charming at first

script.title: Why Narcissists Are So Charming At First

scenes.narration: The most dangerous person you will ever meet will not look dangerous. They will look like the answer to every problem you have ever had.
scenes.image_prompt: black and white film noir style, empty ornate chair in a spotlight, swirling fog around it, shadows creeping from edges, cinematic, high contrast

scenes.narration: Narcissists are not charming by accident. Charm is a weapon. And psychology research shows they deploy it with surgical precision in the first ninety days.
scenes.image_prompt: black and white film noir style, a silver dagger wrapped in red velvet ribbon, dramatic side lighting, rich textures, moody shadows

scenes.narration: They mirror you. Your hobbies, your wounds, your dreams. Suddenly this stranger feels like the soulmate you have been waiting your entire life to find.
scenes.image_prompt: black and white film noir style, cracked antique mirror reflecting a single empty silhouette, dust in the air, harsh directional light

scenes.narration: This is called love bombing. An overwhelming flood of attention, gifts, and intimacy designed to short-circuit your judgment before you notice anything is wrong.
scenes.image_prompt: black and white film noir style, wilted roses piled on a dark wooden floor, single candle burning low, smoke drifting upward, atmospheric

scenes.narration: Researchers call the second phase devaluation. The compliments vanish. The warmth turns cold. And you start chasing the version of them you met on day one.
scenes.image_prompt: black and white film noir style, an hourglass on a cracked marble table, sand draining fast, long shadow stretched across the wall

scenes.narration: The trap is chemical. Your brain releases dopamine chasing unpredictable affection. That is the same neural pattern that makes slot machines addictive.
scenes.image_prompt: black and white film noir style, vintage slot machine handle gripped by a gloved hand, reels spinning, neon glare cutting through darkness

scenes.narration: By the time you see it clearly, you are bonded to someone who never actually existed. The charming stranger was a performance. You were the audience.
scenes.image_prompt: black and white film noir style, empty theater stage with velvet curtains half closed, single spotlight on a discarded mask on the floor

scenes.narration: If someone feels too perfect too fast, that is not chemistry. That is choreography. The people who love you quietly rarely arrive in a flood.
scenes.image_prompt: black and white film noir style, a single small flickering candle beside a closed leather journal, quiet stillness, soft moody shadows
